projects.title: Terminal Grep Tool
projects.description: Build a fast command-line utility to search for strings within files, implementing basic regex-like matching and file I/O in Rust.

projects.title: In-Memory Key-Value Store
projects.description: Develop a thread-safe, in-memory data store using HashMaps and Mutexes, featuring basic GET/SET/DELETE operations.

projects.title: Multi-threaded Web Server
projects.description: Create a high-performance web server from scratch that handles multiple concurrent TCP connections using a custom thread pool.
